title: Epic Trails
subTitle: Eric Hanson explores the Wales Coast Path with Big Blue Adventures.

title: Epic Trails
subTitle: Eric Hanson hikes the East Coast Trail in Newfoundland and Labrador, Canada.

title: Epic Exploring
subTitle: Josh and explorer Steve Duncan travel to Tallinn in Estonia where they explore Patarei Prison; in Vietnam, Cody and his friend, Sherman Mak, travels to Pan Thiet in search of abandoned amusement park Soui Cat.

title: Epic Exploring
subTitle: Urban explorers Josh and Cody visit Germany and Morocco in search of astonishing abandoned locations including Wünsdorf, the forbidden city near Berlin, and an abandoned film set in the Sahara desert used for "Game of Thrones."

title: Epic Exploring
subTitle: In Georgia, Cody and roof-topper Harry Gallagher ride in a cable car known as Stalin's coffin; in France, Josh searches for abandoned chateaus with globetrotter Lexie Limitless.

title: The Armchair Adventurer
subTitle: Xander and his team travel to Graaff-Reinet, one of the oldest towns in South Africa, to enjoy food history and nature, while Adam spends the day searching for fossils in his hometown.

title: The Armchair Adventurer
subTitle: Xander and his team drive 11 hours to Dullstroom, a quaint town where fishing and drinking prevails; across the pond, Adam's desire to participate with Xander and his crew takes him all the way to the grocery store.

title: The Armchair Adventurer
subTitle: On opposite sides of the world, Adam and a member of the South African crew each attempt to conquer their fears.

title: Beyond the Beaten Path
subTitle: The brothers use a Felucca Boat to travel north along the Nile, from the oasis town of Aswan to the ancient city of Luxor, before finding a massive sand dune to slide down.

subTitle: Gregg explores the food scene in the city of Edinburgh, discovering its incredible history as well as his personal connection to Scotland.

title: Australia's Amazing Homes
subTitle: The guys look beyond the walls and moats to explore urban castles; they visit a home with a triangular plan.

title: Australia's Amazing Homes
subTitle: Australia is universally known for it's sun and it's beaches; Johanna and Pete visit some coastal retreats that not only have popular architecture but set benchmarks for environmental design.

subTitle: In the path of the El Niño storm, Brad Domke aims for the big wave surfing history books by skimming the waves of Pe'ahi, Hawaii.

subTitle: Will Skudin and Keali'i Mamala deal with the trials and tribulations of life as traveling big wave surfers.

title: Road Less Traveled
subTitle: Jonathan explores India's polo roots in Manipur, meets a women's polo club, discovers a horse god, and uncovers local martial arts.

title: Capturing Winter
subTitle: Layla Kerley is a self-taught adventure photographer and one of the few females in her field; together with Bruno Compagnet, co-founder of freeski brand Blackcrows, they plan to traverse one of the last wildernesses in Europe: the Italian Dolomites.

subTitle: Renowned winter photographer Tristan Shu attempts a photograph that combines astrophotography with action sports; his aim is to capture ski and snowboard tricks at night set against the Milky-way and the spectacular Mont-Blanc.

subTitle: Aurélie Gonin is one of the few women working in winter action sports filmmaking; she directs a ski and snowboarding qualification event for the Freeride World Tour.

subTitle: Ashique Thahir leads an eventful Italian adventure; he surprises the team with Vespa rides along the coast, adapts plans with an aquarium visit, and arranges a Fiat 500 countryside drive; the trip ends with relaxation at a Roman cave spa.

title: Car & Country Quest
subTitle: Freddie Hunt leads Deepak and Ashique through Ferrari's Maranello HQ, joined by Mathias Lauda; from factory tours showcasing Ferrari's craftsmanship to dining in Ferrari's restaurant, the team immerses in Ferrari's legacy, building excitement.

title: Travel Quest

subTitle: Bill tracks some of the rainforest creatures he's always wanted to see; Bill investigates a new, private conservation effort in Brazil.
